arts.ttl: Liverpool could submit offer for Atletico Madrid ace, negotiations to begin at €50 million
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen on signing the Atletico Madrid midfielder Pablo Barrios. The 21-year-old is highly-rated across Europe and several European heavyweights are keeping tabs on his situation. According to a report from Fichajes, Liverpool have shown interest in acquiring his services but Atletico Madrid are not keen on sanctioning his departure. arts.ttl: Diego Simeone confirms reports on circumstances surrounding Samu Omorodion’s Atletico Madrid exit
arts.sum: In recent weeks, there has been plenty of discussion about Samu Omorodion, who has made a flying start to life at FC Porto. The 21-year-old left Atletico Madrid without playing a single match, as he was on loan at Alaves during the one season that he was registered to Los Colchoneros. arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid star’s injury absence extended into November
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid star Marcos Llorente could see his injury absence extended into November. The Spain international was forced off at half time in Los Rojiblancos’ 4-0 UEFA Champions League defeat away at Benfica on October 2. The initial prognosis was positive, with no major injury detected, and a month-long recovery predicted for a muscular overload.
